{{Expand}}

{{Infobox spell
| name = Archmage-level detection spells
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Archmage-level detection spells]] can be used to find agents.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"It also won’t find any agents that are shielded from Archmage-level detection spells, and there are mundane ways to hide from it."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Spells]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
